overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a gothic great hall reminiscent of Harry Potter, featuring floating candles, long dining tables filled with students, stained glass windows, and translucent ghostly figures floating through the space. The camera maintains an elevated aerial perspective with slow drifting motion above the dining hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

events.description: translucent ghostly figures begin to materialize and enter from the right side of the hall

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting above the hall at aerial height, observing the dining students and emerging ghostly figures

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure floating into the hall from the right side near the fireplace

entered.detail: thousands of floating candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination
tall gothic stained glass windows showing dark night sky outside
long stone dining tables filled with students and food
tall stone walls with architectural details
large stone fireplace with burning fire on the right side of the hall
decorative tapestries hanging on the far wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a grand gothic dining hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles overhead. Long stone dining tables fill the space with seated figures eating. Stained glass windows line the right wall showing the night outside. Around the 8-second mark, translucent ghostly figures begin to materialize near the fireplace on the right and float into the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and dining tables

events.description: ghostly figures complete their traversal and fade out as they exit the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing slow aerial drift while observing the ghostly figures traverse the hall

notable_agents.action: ghostly figure floating horizontally across the center of the hall from right to left

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its slow drift above the hall as the translucent ghostly figures float across the center of the space, passing between the dining tables. The warm candlelight continues to illuminate the scene while the ghosts maintain their ethereal glow. By the end of the segment, the spirits have traversed the hall and begin to fade from view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, elevated drift through a grand gothic dining hall as ethereal spirits materialize and glide across the candlelit space. It begins above long stone tables filled with seated figures, with thousands of floating candles overhead and stained glass windows revealing the night sky. As the camera moves, translucent ghostly figures emerge near a fireplace on the right and float steadily into the center of the hall. The scene then shifts as these glowing spirits traverse the expanse between the dining tables, their ethereal light blending with the warm flicker of the candles. Finally, the camera continues its steady glide as the ghosts reach the far side of the hall and gradually fade from view.
